channel.title: Coding on Personal Wiki
channel.description: Recent content in Coding on Personal Wiki

item.title: Your first open source contribution - termux
item.description:
This guide is supposed to guide/inspire you and not fully help u to make your first open source software contributions I will be using my own github commits as an example

Github: https://github.com/pranav10780

See also

  • Medium Story - same story in medium
  • My projects — tools I have built
  • Experience — my background
